prompt: Write a paragraph about the sun. Do not use the letter 'e' anywhere in your response, not even within other words. Avoid every word that contains the letter e.
response: Our sun is a giant ball of hot gas sitting at the hub of our solar system. It is a star, burning bright through fusion of hydrogen atoms in its core. This mighty orb grants us light and warmth, making survival on our world a possibility. Without its radiant glow, all living things would vanish. Its gravity pulls all surrounding worlds into orbit, including our own. Scholars and astronomers study this brilliant star to unlock its many puzzling traits. From dawn to dusk, our sun lights up our sky, giving us days full of color and joy. It is truly a magnificent and awe-inspiring cosmic body that sustains all known living organisms on this world.
